purpose: Static audit manifest for lyric providers. Runtime code does not read this file.
note: 这是在线歌词来源审计清单，不是运行时排序配置；运行时 API 地址、媒体源匹配和优先级在 config/lyrics-api-rules.json 中统一配置。

fieldNotes.surface: 该歌词源由网页端、Bridge 本地服务或二者共同调用。
fieldNotes.domains: 可能访问的本机地址或外部域名。
fieldNotes.sends: 查询歌词时可能发送的媒体字段。
fieldNotes.sourceHints: 适合优先尝试该歌词源的媒体 sourceId 关键词。
fieldNotes.risk: 发布到创意工坊前需要关注的隐私、合规或稳定性风险。

bridge.purpose: Ask the optional local Bridge for lyrics for the current media identity.
bridge.说明: 通过本机 Bridge 查询歌词。网页端只请求本机地址，Bridge 内部可能继续请求外部歌词源。
bridge.requestCount: 1 local request; Bridge may make external lyric requests internally
bridge.risk: medium: local service can proxy metadata to external lyric services when online lyrics are enabled

vkeys.purpose: Search QQ Music and NetEase lyric data through the third-party VKeys aggregation API.
vkeys.说明: 第三方聚合歌词接口，可按 QQ 音乐或网易云相关媒体源优先尝试；文档见 https://doc.vkeys.cn/ 和 https://github.com/luoyue712/api-doc。
vkeys.risk: high: third-party aggregation API, terms, availability, and upstream stability must be verified before public release

lrclib.purpose: Fetch synchronized or plain lyrics from LRCLIB.
lrclib.说明: 公共歌词 API，可用歌名、歌手、专辑和时长查询同步歌词或纯文本歌词。
lrclib.risk: medium: public lyric API but still sends media identity to an external service
